title: psilocarya corymbifera
side_effects: Psilocarya corymbifera can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, vomiting, and stomach discomfort due to its potential toxicity. In some cases, excessive consumption of this plant has been linked to headaches, dizziness, and even hallucinations, especially in individuals with a history of mental health conditions. Improper use of Psilocarya corymbifera can also lead to increased heart rate and blood pressure, which may be problematic for people with pre-existing cardiovascular conditions. Furthermore, misuse of this plant has been associated with rare but serious side effects, including seizures and psychosis in extreme cases.
